rationale: Gov't Code §2303.401 defines 'new permanent job' and 'retained job' for enterprise zone projects. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemptions; no conflict exists.
quote:
Sec. 2303.401. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "New permanent job" means a new employment position that:
_note: Rule text concerns enterprise project job definitions; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
